g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Sensors and PLC layer')

g.text: Inputs: PIR · LDR · smoke sensor · door switch
DS18B20 temperature via ESP32 → D0 register

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ESP32 Gateway layer')

g.text: Modbus RTU (RS485) to read/write PLC registers
MQTT pub/sub to relay data + receive commands

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MQTT Broker layer')

g.text: WebSocket port for browser dashboard access

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Backend layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Dashboard layer')

g.text: Live sensor monitoring via MQTT WebSocket

svg.text: Upward (status): Sensors → PLC → ESP32 →[MQTT status]→ Dashboard every 3 s
Downward (control): Dashboard → Backend →[MQTT control]→ ESP32 → PLC coil write
Acknowledge: ESP32 →[MQTT ack]→ Backend · confirms executed state
